name: Moong Samosa (Mung Bean Pastry)
recipeInstructions:
1. Heat 2 tablespoons ghee in a skillet over low heat.
2. Saute the onion, asafetida, mustard seeds, and ginger until the onion is golden brown.
3. Stir in garam masala, green mango powder, salt, and cayenne. Mix thoroughly.
4. Add beans, cover the pan, and cook over moderate heat for 10 minutes until the beans are tender.
5. Stir in cilantro and remove from heat.
6. Divide into 8 portions.
7. Brush one half moon of pastry with water and fold into a cone.
8. Fill each cone with 1 portion of filling and seal the top.
9. Repeat with remaining pastry.
10. Heat enough ghee in a wok or large skillet to deep-fry 4 samosas at once.
11. When very hot, deep-fry the samosas for a few minutes until golden-brown on both sides.
12. Remove from heat and drain well before serving.
